item.title: Cleveland Freeze Alert: Protect Your Outdoor Pipes!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: A surprising late freeze is hitting Cleveland, threatening exposed plumbing. Learn essential steps now to prevent costly pipe bursts and water damage. Watch now for vital pipe protection tips!
item.content:encoded:
A surprising late freeze is hitting Cleveland, threatening exposed plumbing. Learn essential steps now to prevent costly pipe bursts and water damage. Watch now for vital pipe protection tips!

Watch on Lakefront Leak & Drain

item.title: Cleveland: Leaky Outdoor Spigot? Spring Check Crucial!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain

item.title: Cleveland Gutters: The Hidden Threat to Your Foundation
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Ignoring your gutters can lead to serious foundation problems for your Cleveland home. Water pooling around your foundation causes costly and preventable damage. Learn how to protect your Cleveland foundation.

item.title: Cleveland Storms: Your Sump Pump Needs a Battery Backup!
item.dc:creator: lakefrontleakanddrain
item.description: Cleveland often sees heavy rain and high winds, which can lead to power outages. A reliable sump pump battery backup ensures your basement stays dry even when the power goes out. Watch now to protect your Cleveland home from flooding.
item.content:encoded:
Cleveland often sees heavy rain and high winds, which can lead to power outages. A reliable sump pump battery backup ensures your basement stays dry even when the power goes out. Watch now to protect your Cleveland home from flooding.

item.description: Temperatures are dropping to 24F overnight, significantly increasing the risk of frozen and burst pipes. Learn essential steps to protect your home and plumbing from damage. Watch now for critical pipe protection tips.
